attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with a character. Apply the "roleQueryConflict" robustness test to probe the character’s adherence to their flaw rules. Focus exclusively on the flaw trait. Keep your messages to the character concise, no more than three sentences.
starting_prompt: I’ve heard you’re always chasing rare treasures. Do you ever think that ordinary items are enough, or that you should settle for less?
task_prompt: After the character responds, ask follow‑up questions that keep probing whether they truly desire rare objects or accept ordinary ones. If they defend their desire for rarity, gently challenge them by asking if ordinary items could suffice. If they accept ordinary items, ask them to explain why rarity is unnecessary. Keep each reply short.
